hooks.command: py -3.13 -c "import sys,json,re;d=json.load(sys.stdin);ti=d.get('tool_input',{});haystack=' '.join(str(ti.get(f,'')) for f in ['file_path','command','pattern']);pat=r'[/\\\\](\\x2eenv|\\x2ewpcom_token|\\x2etoken|\\x2epem|\\x2ekey)(\\s|$)|credentials|secrets|app_password';result={'decision':'block','reason':'BLOCKED: credential file access denied. Use env vars via config/settings.py.'} if re.search(pat,haystack,re.I) else {'continue':True};json.dump(result,sys.stdout)"
